title: Coal (Sale) Ordinance Repealed by Act II of 2015
text:
COAL (SALE) [CAP. 7. 1
CHAPTER 7
COAL (SALE) ORDINANCE
To make provision respecting the sale of coal.
9th July, 1839*
ORDINANCE VIII of 1839.
Repealed by Act II of 2015.
*See Proclamation No. VII of the 9 July, 1839.
2 CONSTITUTION OF MALTA
